narrative_texts.data_source: competency-runtime.computeTypeProfile → onto_competency_profiles domain scores, grouped by competency type (domain-PROXY mean per type; an onto-domain with no bank code, e.g. strategic, is unmeasurable and excluded).
narrative_texts.interpretation: The radar contrasts capability across competency types (behavioural, cognitive, functional, technical, future-skills). Each type mean is a domain-proxy: every competency inherits the measured score of its onto-domain. A balanced shape indicates broad capability; a skewed shape highlights concentration.
narrative_texts.confidence_level: Derived from 100% type-classification coverage (structural; not measured scores).
narrative_texts.executive_summary: Sarah Johnson's capability is measured across 4 competency types (domain-proxy), classification coverage 100%.
narrative_texts.assessment_summary: Mean domain-proxy score by competency type — Behavioral: 80.4; Cognitive: 82; Functional: 74; Technical: 74.
narrative_texts.generated_timestamp:
This report was generated on 26 June 2026 at 00:51 UTC.

Report pack version: 1.0.0. It is a point-in-time snapshot; re-running the assessment workflow refreshes the underlying data.
